center.name: 阿拉伯海
center.summary: 阿拉伯海是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括阿穆爾隼，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in south-eastern Siberia and Northern China before migrating in large flocks across India and over the Arabian Sea to winter in Southern and East African coasts

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It breeds in south-eastern Siberia and Northern China before migrating in large flocks across India and over the Arabian Sea to winter in Southern and East African coasts
